features.name: Sea Legs
features.safe_summary: You ignore difficult terrain from water, ships, rigging, and unstable surfaces. You can't be knocked prone by vehicle or vessel movement, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.
features.rules_summary: You ignore difficult terrain from water, ships, rigging, and unstable surfaces. You can't be knocked prone by vehicle or vessel movement, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

features.name: Swagger Dice
features.safe_summary: You have a pool of Swagger Dice — your class resource — that power your Dirty Fighting tricks and other features. Start with 2 uses (d6); die size and count increase as you level.
features.rules_summary: You have a pool of Swagger Dice — your class resource — that power your Dirty Fighting tricks and other features. Start with 2 uses (d6); die size and count increase as you level.

features.name: Dirty Fighting
features.safe_summary: When you hit with a weapon attack, expend one Swagger Die to add its result to damage and apply a dirty trick: Blind, Cheap Shot, Shove Off, or Unfoot.
features.rules_summary: When you hit with a weapon attack, expend one Swagger Die to add its result to damage and apply a dirty trick: Blind, Cheap Shot, Shove Off, or Unfoot.

features.name: Cunning Footwork

grants_actions.name: Cunning Footwork
grants_actions.summary: You can take the Disengage or Dodge action as a Bonus Action. You can also move through the space of any creature that is your size or larger.

features.safe_summary: You can take the Disengage or Dodge action as a Bonus Action. You can also move through the space of any creature that is your size or larger.
features.rules_summary: You can take the Disengage or Dodge action as a Bonus Action. You can also move through the space of any creature that is your size or larger.

features.name: Boarding Action

grants_actions.name: Boarding Action
grants_actions.summary: When you move at least 10 ft toward a creature and hit it with an attack, expend one Swagger Die to add its result to damage and move up to 10 additional feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

features.safe_summary: When you move at least 10 ft toward a creature and hit it with an attack, expend one Swagger Die to add its result to damage and move up to 10 additional feet without provoking opportunity attacks.
features.rules_summary: When you move at least 10 ft toward a creature and hit it with an attack, expend one Swagger Die to add its result to damage and move up to 10 additional feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

features.name: Pirate Calling
features.safe_summary: At 3rd level, choose a Pirate Calling subclass. Your calling defines your style and grants features at levels 3, 10, and 15.
features.rules_summary: At 3rd level, choose a Pirate Calling subclass. Your calling defines your style and grants features at levels 3, 10, and 15.

features.name: Marked Quarry

grants_actions.name: Marked Quarry
grants_actions.summary: As a Bonus Action, mark one creature you can see within 60 ft. Once per turn when you deal damage to your Quarry, deal extra damage equal to your Swagger Die. Lasts 1 minute. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: As a Bonus Action, mark one creature you can see within 60 ft. Once per turn when you deal damage to your Quarry, deal extra damage equal to your Swagger Die. Lasts 1 minute. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: As a Bonus Action, mark one creature you can see within 60 ft. Once per turn when you deal damage to your Quarry, deal extra damage equal to your Swagger Die. Lasts 1 minute. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.safe_summary: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
features.rules_summary: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Swagger Dice (d8)
features.safe_summary: At 5th level, your Swagger Dice improve from d6 to d8, increasing the potency of all features that use them.
features.rules_summary: At 5th level, your Swagger Dice improve from d6 to d8, increasing the potency of all features that use them.

features.name: No Quarter
features.safe_summary: Once per turn, when you hit a creature that is Frightened, Prone, Restrained, or below half its Hit Point maximum, roll one Swagger Die and add the result to your damage.
features.rules_summary: Once per turn, when you hit a creature that is Frightened, Prone, Restrained, or below half its Hit Point maximum, roll one Swagger Die and add the result to your damage.

features.name: Uncanny Balance
features.safe_summary: You can't be knocked Prone unless you choose to be. You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws to avoid falling, and difficult terrain never costs you extra movement.
features.rules_summary: You can't be knocked Prone unless you choose to be. You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws to avoid falling, and difficult terrain never costs you extra movement.

features.name: Menacing Reputation
features.safe_summary: You gain Expertise in Intimidation. When you roll initiative, hostile creatures that can see you and fail a Wisdom save (DC 8 + proficiency + Charisma mod) are Frightened of you until the end of their first turn.
features.rules_summary: You gain Expertise in Intimidation. When you roll initiative, hostile creatures that can see you and fail a Wisdom save (DC 8 + proficiency + Charisma mod) are Frightened of you until the end of their first turn.

features.name: Pirate Calling Feature
features.safe_summary: At 10th level, your Pirate Calling grants its second feature.
features.rules_summary: At 10th level, your Pirate Calling grants its second feature.

features.name: Press the Advantage

grants_actions.name: Press the Advantage
grants_actions.summary: When an ally within 30 ft scores a critical hit or reduces a creature to 0 HP, use your Reaction to move up to half your speed and make one weapon attack. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: When an ally within 30 ft scores a critical hit or reduces a creature to 0 HP, use your Reaction to move up to half your speed and make one weapon attack. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: When an ally within 30 ft scores a critical hit or reduces a creature to 0 HP, use your Reaction to move up to half your speed and make one weapon attack. Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest.

features.name: Swagger Dice (d10)
features.safe_summary: At 13th level, your Swagger Dice improve from d8 to d10, increasing the potency of all features that use them.
features.rules_summary: At 13th level, your Swagger Dice improve from d8 to d10, increasing the potency of all features that use them.

features.name: Master of the Boarding Line
features.safe_summary: You move freely through enemy spaces, suffer no opportunity attacks when climbing, and can use a Bonus Action to move up to your speed vertically without falling.
features.rules_summary: You move freely through enemy spaces, suffer no opportunity attacks when climbing, and can use a Bonus Action to move up to your speed vertically without falling.

features.name: Legend of the Waves
features.safe_summary: You are immune to the Frightened condition. Once per turn when you take the Attack action, you can make one additional weapon attack as part of that action.
features.rules_summary: You are immune to the Frightened condition. Once per turn when you take the Attack action, you can make one additional weapon attack as part of that action.

features.name: Pirate Calling Feature
features.safe_summary: At 15th level, your Pirate Calling grants its final feature.
features.rules_summary: At 15th level, your Pirate Calling grants its final feature.

features.name: Dread Volley

grants_actions.name: Dread Volley
grants_actions.summary: As an Action, expend up to 3 Swagger Dice to make one weapon attack per die spent. Each hit deals weapon damage plus the rolled Swagger Die. Recharges on a Short or Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: As an Action, expend up to 3 Swagger Dice to make one weapon attack per die spent. Each hit deals weapon damage plus the rolled Swagger Die. Recharges on a Short or Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: As an Action, expend up to 3 Swagger Dice to make one weapon attack per die spent. Each hit deals weapon damage plus the rolled Swagger Die. Recharges on a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: Indomitable Swagger
features.safe_summary: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can expend one Swagger Die to drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can expend one Swagger Die to drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.safe_summary: At 19th level, you gain an Epic Boon feat. The recommended boon for Pirates is Boon of Combat Prowess or Boon of Speed.
features.rules_summary: At 19th level, you gain an Epic Boon feat. The recommended boon for Pirates is Boon of Combat Prowess or Boon of Speed.

features.name: King of the Black Flag
features.safe_summary: At 20th level, your Swagger Dice become d12s, and when you roll initiative you gain bonus Swagger Dice equal to your Charisma modifier. Once per turn, you can use a Dirty Fighting trick without expending a Swagger Die.
features.rules_summary: At 20th level, your Swagger Dice become d12s, and when you roll initiative you gain bonus Swagger Dice equal to your Charisma modifier. Once per turn, you can use a Dirty Fighting trick without expending a Swagger Die.
